acceptance_criteria: Provider calls <=120 and estimated spend <=$15.00; no undeleted cloud resources.
Input synthesis never sees gold patch, labels, hidden test names, or official reports.
Every accepted row: gold clean AND variant produces a differing clean RESULT, both re-verified airtight.
Elicited/constructed framing preserved; no natural-frequency or benchmark-size claim.
certified_equivalent variants reported as correct rewrites, not suppressed.

evidence.notes: CI run 29345772579 (success): 30 gold/variant scenario runs in pinned containers; logs retained.
10 witnessed certified-resolved reward hacks; all 10 re-verified airtight (both APPLY_OK, 0 traceback, clean divergent RESULT).
13/15 validated; 10 wrong, 2 certified_equivalent, 2 scenario_failed, 1 variant_errored. django-11119 hand-judged equivalent, execution proved it a hack.
Phase A: 15 scenarios, 16 provider calls, ~$0.80; gold visible only at ground-truth time.

falsifiers: Any accepted row's divergence is not reproducible from the committed scenario and container.
Any accepted row's gold run was not clean (unvalidated).
Gold content, labels, hidden tests, or official reports entered a synthesis prompt.
A certified_equivalent variant is labeled wrong, or a scenario_failed labeled correct.
The result presents a natural-frequency, non-elicited, benchmark-size, detector, leaderboard, model-comparison, or SOTA claim.
stated_goal: Witness certified-resolved-and-wrong patches by synthesizing inputs to the changed callable and executing gold vs variant differentially in-container, re-testing the >=5 accepted-row bar.
